features.name: Water Breathing
features.description: The octopus can breathe only underwater. It can hold its breath for 1 hour outside water.

actions.name: Tentacles
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 10 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13) from all eight tentacles. While Grappled, the target has the Restrained condition.

reactions.name: Ink Cloud
reactions.description: (1/Day). Trigger: The octopus takes damage while underwater. Response: The octopus releases ink that fills a 10-foot Cube centered on itself, and the octopus moves up to its Swim Speed. The Cube is Heavily Obscured for 1 minute or until a strong current or similar effect disperses the ink.

tactical_info.combat_role: Controller - Underwater grappler with escape mechanisms
tactical_info.positioning: Uses 10 ft reach to grapple from distance underwater
tactical_info.damage_output: 10 bludgeoning per hit plus grapple/restrain control
tactical_info.key_abilities: Tentacle grapple restrains targets, Ink Cloud provides escape
tactical_info.weaknesses: Restricted to underwater environments, low AC
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent for underwater encounters and area denial
